title: Playground Command Table Cockpit
concept: A command-search cockpit where grouped command results drive route-specific forms while a table-led admin surface, selected detail panel, transfer history, and protected live WordPress preview mutate together.
focus: command search as the discovery layer
table-led saved and transfer state management
stateful save, import, export, delete, file, Blueprint, database, and log workflows
flows: Search and run Playground commands from grouped results with visible constraints, validation, progress, confirmation, and final result state
Finish ZIP download and GitHub export flows with source status, progress, generated result, transfer history row, and live preview preservation
Finish local-directory save with folder picker, permission grant, copy progress, selected folder identity, local storage badge, and Save & Reload consequence
Transform saved-table rows through temporary, browser saved, local permission, imported, exported, deleted, renamed, and active selected states
Start or import from Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, and .zip with real inputs and replacement warnings
Use Site Manager Settings, Files, Blueprint, Database, Logs, Export to GitHub, and Download as zip without hiding the active WordPress shell
Run destructive or replacement flows including delete saved Playground, ZIP import over current, Blueprint run over current, and settings reset or Save & Reload
Browse a labeled Blueprint gallery subset with current categories, search, selected Blueprint detail, URL field, editor, copy, download, run, validation, and result state
featureCoverage: Vanilla WordPress start route
WordPress PR preview route with PR number or URL
Gutenberg PR or branch preview route
GitHub import with account connection and token caveat
Blueprint URL runner
Import .zip with chooser, validation, confirmation, progress, and imported result
Blueprint gallery categories and search with honest 43 available, 9 shown labeling
Featured Blueprint shortcuts and selected Blueprint detail
Save temporary Playground in browser storage with progress and slug
Save to local directory with folder picker, permission state, progress, folder identity, and reload consequence
Saved and unsaved Playground table with open/manage, rename, delete, final deleted state, and selected detail
Current shell path input, refresh, Homepage, WP Admin, temporary/saved/local/imported state, Save, reset, and reload consequences
Site Manager tabs for Settings, Files, Blueprint, Database, and Logs
Settings for WordPress version, older versions, PHP version, language, network access, multisite, destructive reset, and Save & Reload
File browser with create file, create folder, upload, browse files, selected file editor, dirty state, save result, and revert
Blueprint tools with blueprint.json editor, Blueprint URL, copy link, download bundle, run Blueprint, validation, and result state
Database driver, SQLite path, size, database.sqlite download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with empty and warning examples
Export to GitHub with connection, repository, branch, progress, commit result, and transfer row
Download as zip with source status, progress, generated archive, and transfer history
Portability surfaces for GitHub import/export, ZIP import/download, database download, and Blueprint bundle actions
